title: Sakana: Fable 5 Intelligence WITHOUT Fable 5!
summary: Sakana released Fugu, a multi-agent orchestration system with a standard and higher-end "Fugu Ultra" variant that uses panel-style synthesis of multiple model responses. The system is accessible via a single model API and reportedly matches frontier models like Claude and others on benchmarks.
writeup: The video covers Sakana's release of Fugu, a multi-agent orchestration system that comes in a standard version and a higher-end "Fugu Ultra" variant, which synthesizes multiple model responses in a panel-style approach. Fugu is accessible through a single model API and reportedly matches frontier models such as Claude on benchmarks. The core point is that orchestrating and combining several model responses can reach frontier-level results, an application of agent orchestration and test-time compute.
